Class JOperatorSV

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractOperator
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.JAbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.JOperatorSV
All Implemented Interfaces:
Sorted, Named, Operator, ParsableVariable, SortedOperator, OperatorSV, SchemaVariable, Sorted, SyntaxElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
FormulaSV, ProgramSV, SkolemTermSV, TermLabelSV, TermSV, UpdateSV, VariableSV
public abstract class JOperatorSV extends JAbstractSortedOperator implements OperatorSV, SchemaVariable, Named
Abstract base class for schema variables.

    Checks whether the top level structure of the given @link Term is syntactically valid, given the assumption that the top level operator of the term is the same as this Operator.

  • Method Details

    • toString

      protected final String toString(String sortSpec)

    • isStrict

      public final boolean isStrict()
      Specified by:
      isStrict in interface SchemaVariable
      Returns:
      true if the schemavariable has the strict modifier which forces the instantiation to have exactly the same sort as the schemavariable (or if the sv is of generic sort - the instantiation of the generic sort)

    • validTopLevelException

      public void validTopLevelException(Term term) throws TermCreationException
      Description copied from class: AbstractOperator
      Checks whether the top level structure of the given @link Term is syntactically valid, given the assumption that the top level operator of the term is the same as this Operator. The assumption that the top level operator and the term are equal is NOT checked.
      Specified by:
      validTopLevelException in interface Operator
      Overrides:
      validTopLevelException in class JAbstractSortedOperator
      Throws:
      TermCreationException - if a construction error was recognised
